description: ATLAS Research Mission schema used by Ajani, Hermes, Minerva, and Council.

mission_fields.title: short mission title
mission_fields.owner_role: Chief Engineer | Chief Robotics & Design | Chief Scientist | Executive Board
mission_fields.status: queued | running | blocked | council_review | completed | archived
mission_fields.goal: what the mission is trying to learn or decide
mission_fields.source_ids: approved source ids from World Knowledge Network
mission_fields.related_projects: array of ATLAS project names or ids
